title: How can I develop setting view with dynamic data
excerpt: hi, I need to create setting view for board view app, How I can send dynamic data to feilds, and create a custom dropdown.

posts.author: yousefShallah (yousef)
posts.cookedHtml: hi, I need to create setting view for board view app, How I can send dynamic data to feilds, and create a custom dropdown.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@yousefShallah

That’s a great question.

I’m afraid you will not be able to populate your Board View or Item/Dashboard Widget settings dynamically into a dropdown of choices. Instead, you’ll need to develop this option within your app, and then you will be able to use the storage API in order to store the settings.

I hope this helps!

-ALex

posts.author: yousefShallah (yousef)
posts.cookedHtml: how can I use the storage API in order to store the settings, and how can I replace the settings view I build it with your settings view?
